overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a golden convertible driving through a futuristic desert city. The vehicle navigates through commercial streets, passes a large Ferris wheel amusement structure, and drives under elevated highway overpasses in a sunlit cyberpunk environment.

driving through intersection with other vehicles visible

modern street lamp posts with orange fixtures

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a golden convertible accelerating from a roundabout in a suburban area. Green residential buildings line the left side while palm trees dot the landscape. The camera follows the car as it drives forward through a sunlit street with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distant background.

segments.scene_description: The car turns right at an intersection into a more commercial area. A massive Ferris wheel becomes visible in the distance, marking an amusement park zone. The surroundings transition from residential to commercial with billboards and neon signs appearing along the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: amusement park area with large Ferris wheel

segments.scene_description: Driving through the heart of the amusement district, the massive Ferris wheel dominates the right side of the frame. The car navigates turns around the park perimeter, passing road barriers and graffiti-covered walls. Street vendors and pedestrians are visible near the amusement park structures.

events.description: entering the elevated highway underpass area with reduced sky visibility
slight steering adjustment while driving under massive concrete overpasses

agents.ego_description: driving under massive elevated highway overpasses in an industrial transition zone, maintaining steady speed

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to an industrial corridor beneath massive elevated highway overpasses. The sky becomes partially obscured by concrete structures, creating mixed lighting conditions. The car drives between support pillars and concrete barriers, transitioning away from the amusement district into a more utilitarian urban zone.

events.description: turning right under the highway overpass
navigating through light traffic under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: navigating turns beneath the highway overpasses, continuing through the urban corridor with other traffic

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the car turning right and continuing beneath the highway overpasses. Futuristic billboards and mixed commercial-residential buildings line the street. The environment transitions from industrial to more commercial with palm trees reappearing, while the massive highway structure remains overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a golden convertible as it travels from a sunlit suburban periphery into a dense, industrial urban corridor. It begins by accelerating from a roundabout past green residential buildings and palm trees, moving toward a distant skyline of futuristic skyscrapers. As the car turns into a commercial district, the scenery shifts toward an amusement zone where neon billboards appear and a massive Ferris wheel begins to dominate the landscape. The camera then tracks the vehicle past graffiti-covered walls and street vendors before the open sky is obscured by the concrete weight of massive elevated highway overpasses. Finally, the environment transitions into a utilitarian industrial zone, weaving between support pillars and under the highway structure as palm trees and commercial buildings reappear along the roadside.
